bullets: Ranked among the district's top performers — consistently exceeded monthly quotas across phones, plans, accessories, protection, and financing.
Promoted to Assistant Manager; coached a team of 4–8 reps through 1-on-1s, floor coaching, and skill workshops.
Ran store opens/closes, inventory, escalations, and daily huddles.
Turned walk-ins into multi-line accounts through consultative, needs-first selling.
